$comment: A seed bundle is a static list of fact specs. The plant operation replays them at the target position, applying parameter substitution. See seed/done/Chain-Rebuild.md for the full bundle format and parameter system.

manifest.$comment: Resources the seed expects to be present at plant time. Mirrors the requires field on the piece manifest; the substrate doublechecks here too.

parameters.$comment: Parameters the operator can override at plant time. The substrate substitutes ${name} occurrences in the facts list with the supplied value (falling back to default).
parameters.name: spaceName
parameters.description: Name of the wrapper space the seed creates.

facts.$comment: Each fact spec is { verb, action, target, params }. The plant op stamps them in order, re-mapping references between them. See seed/done/Chain-Rebuild.md.
